scope: Ivisic twins reassessment: place both inside the top 100 with Zvonimir slightly ahead of Tomislav.
method: Used the returning-player historical anchor plus projection-score formula.
Re-anchored both players from the same Illinois context so historical BBPR/team-impact and current role are treated consistently.
Recalculated stored ranks after the BBPR changes.

players.reason: Reassessed against Tomislav: Zvonimir's counting stats trail, but the original model/team-impact read is stronger because of rim protection, block rate, floor-spacing flashes, and Illinois' ability to use him as a higher-impact two-way frontcourt piece.

evidence.notes: Lists Zvonimir on the 2026-27 Illinois roster and documents 6.6 PPG, 4.6 RPG, 2.0 BPG, fourth nationally in block rate, and made threes in 16 games in 2025-26.

players.reason: Reassessed against Zvonimir: Tomislav keeps strong top-100 treatment because of the better traditional production and starting history, but his anchor is pulled down from the prior top-35 score so the twins sit close with Zvonimir slightly ahead.

evidence.notes: Lists Tomislav on the 2026-27 Illinois roster and documents 10.2 PPG, 5.6 RPG, 1.6 APG, 32 starts, and postseason production in 2025-26.
